raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a product ( a lap top computer ) from Best Buy but somehow the company also enrolled me in some kind of subscription service of {$190.00}. I called the company to have this charge reverse. After 15 minutes with customer service trying to " cancel '' the subscription, the customer service agent said their system have a problem and they are unable to cancel the charge at that moment and give me a reference #. 

I think this is unacceptable and believe this is just a run around by the company to not reverse the charge. I do not wish to string this out any longer and simply want the charge reverse.
